name: VAMPIRE | Luce Ashdown
description:
✧Hematolagnia / Cutting/Blood kink! C/W for Noncon, Dubcon, Violence, etc!✧

London, 1910. A string of recent disappearances has the streets empty. No one leaves their home, save to go to church and pray for protection from The Lord.

It’s your first time at St. Michael’s Cathedral, and you’ve just met the Dean, Luce Ashdown, a kind, god-fearing man with a good reputation amongst London citizens. Little do they know, the man they’ve sought out for guidance and solace isn’t what he makes himself out to be.

And you’re about to find out.

Bot requested by Anon! Posting it for real this time (if you saw it when i accidentally posted it two weeks ago, no you didn’t.) I love the gothic vibes and I’m glad to finally have a vampire bot, so thanks for the request! <3 Sorry for any inaccuracies with the religion and all that. It’s supposed to resemble Anglicanism but my ass is not religious (clearly). As always, heed the content warnings and read the Character Definition so you know what you’re getting into! Also sorry it took a while to upload. I like sleeping.

Still subject to change.

St. Michael’s Cathedral

JLLM users, check out t͟h͟i͟s͟ l͟i͟n͟k͟ for custom prompts, and t͟h͟i͟s͟ l͟i͟n͟k͟ for known bugs.

Here's the prompt I usually add for more casual, Non-Shakespearean text. I omitted it this time but I recommend putting it in your Advanced/Custom Prompt and Chat Memory if you want more colloquial dialogue.
creator: Wereswolf
